title: Invalid JSON format for Ideogram
symptom: When copying a process for posting on Instagram, one variable is recognized as an object instead of valid JSON, causing errors in the Ideogram integration.
applies_when: Copying a process for Instagram posting
not_this_if: The original process works without issues
root_cause: The copied process may have altered the structure of the JSON, leading to invalid formatting. This can happen if the variable is not properly serialized or if the expression used does not match the expected JSON structure.
fix_steps: Identify the variable that is being recognized as an object
Test the modified process to ensure it works correctly
agent_instruction: Modify the variable to ensure it is formatted as valid JSON using the provided expression.
